top_signals.title: New Zealand raises rates for the first time in 3 years
top_signals.summary: RBNZ says future increases expected as effects of Iran war energy shock linger
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indonesia’s stock market hit with second downgrade warning
top_signals.summary: S&P Dow Jones follows MSCI in putting south-east Asian market on watchlist for reclassification to ‘frontier’
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s bank lending rises fastest since COVID-19, backing BOJ’s path
top_signals.summary: The figures reinforce the central bank's assessment that financial conditions remain accommodative even after Gov. Kazuo Ueda's board raised its benchmark interest rate last month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Frying squad: England’s World Cup bid fuelled by cooking oil and leftover food
top_signals.summary: England’s World Cup campaign in the USA, Mexico and Canada is being powered by used cooking oil, leftover food and algae. The decision to maintain a World Cup training base in Kansas City has meant England are racking up the air miles for matches. A 2,800-mile round trip to Mexico City for Sunday night’s last-16 [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Finally, a regulator is ahead of the curve on AI
top_signals.summary: More and more Brits are investing thanks to AI, so the FCA's proposal to embrace that makes complete sense, writes Carl Hazeley.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Secret Network cites AI exploit risks in proposed Arbitrum move
top_signals.summary: “The security risk is the part we take most seriously,” the team said, citing old code and AI exploit risks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
